name: owned_endpoints_disjointness_missing
code:
proof fn phi_4_owned_endpoints_disjointness_missing(
    root_container: ContainerPtr,
    container_perms: Map<ContainerPtr, PointsTo<Container>>,
    c1: ContainerPtr,
    c2: ContainerPtr,
    ep: EndpointPtr,
)
    requires
        container_perms_wf(container_perms),
        container_tree_wf(root_container, container_perms),
        container_perms.dom().contains(c1),
        container_perms.dom().contains(c2),
        c1 != c2,
        container_perms[c1].value().owned_endpoints@.contains(ep),
        container_perms[c2].value().owned_endpoints@.contains(ep),
    ensures
        true,
{
}
reason: No spec enforces that owned_endpoints sets are disjoint across containers — the same endpoint can appear in two different containers' owned sets, violating unique ownership
